full_text:
Shen Pei (Zhengnan) 審配 (正南)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shen Pei (審配), styledZhengnan (正南), was born in Wei commandery. Served Yuan Shao with loyalty. After Shao’s death, sided with his youngest son, Shang. Shen Pei was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty, Yuan Shao, and Yuan Shang. Shen Pei lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
